disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Tight, pressured feeling in the middle of the chest that has built up over about 3 days and is worse tonight
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the chest tightness?
When did the chest feeling start and how has it changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My chest feels really tight and pressured, right in the middle. It's been building for days and it's worse tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels about to black out and severely dizzy each time she stands up
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you stand up?
Have you felt faint or dizzy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Every time I stand up the room spins and I feel like I'm going to black out. I have to sit back down straight away.

trigger_question_examples: Is your heart racing or pounding?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — my heart's been pounding and racing, I can feel it thumping.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has worked almost continuously for about 3 days with little or no sleep
trigger_question_examples: How much have you slept lately?
What's been happening in the last few days?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've barely slept in three days — I've been working the whole time to get ready for a presentation.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has drunk roughly five energy drinks over the last 3 days to keep working, and has barely eaten or drunk water
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any caffeine or energy drinks?
Have you been eating and drinking normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had maybe five energy drinks over the last few days. I haven't really eaten or had water — just caffeine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels she does not belong at work, fears colleagues will realise she is not good enough, attributes her success to being a 'diversity hire', and will not ask for help
trigger_question_examples: What's driving you to keep working through this?
How have things been for you at work?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel like a fraud — like they'll find out I don't belong there. I can't stop or ask for help or they'll see I'm not good enough.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels completely depleted and is shaking
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself physically?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm completely wiped out and I can't stop shaking.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies crushing or central heavy chest pain, denies actually passing out or losing consciousness, and denies pain spreading to the arm, jaw or back
trigger_question_examples: Is the chest pain crushing or heavy, or spreading to your arm or jaw?
Have you actually fainted or blacked out completely?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's tight and pressured but not crushing, and it doesn't spread to my arm or jaw. I haven't actually fainted — I just feel like I'm about to.
